title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 486.790 - Resignation of notary commission
text:
486.790.  Resignation of notary commission. — 1.  A notary who resigns his or her commission shall send to the secretary by any means providing a tangible receipt, including certified mail and electronic transmission, a signed notice indicating the effective date of resignation.
  2.  A notary who ceases to reside in or to maintain a regular place of work or business in this state, or who becomes permanently unable to perform their notarial duties, shall resign their commission.
(L. 2020 H.B. 1655)
